description: Composition Bright Georgia peach pink t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, a bateau neckline, grey thread detailing and graphic print on the front Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash cold using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery If brand lee launched itself in a big way to create great workwear for women, it also ensured to dole out some of the most fashionable leisure wear. And one such outcome is this t-shirt from lee. Revel in the fineries of art, music and film on weekends with this tee, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The stylish embossing on the screen print on the front, coupled with the rubber print makes this T-shirt a true piece of art. Team this with jeans or bermudas and chill out in style. Grab your tee right away, before you find your neighbour wearing one too. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 5'7"; Chest: 33"; Waist: 25"
